studyName: eMERGE Network Study of Resistant Hypertension

variables.name: age_observation_max_bp
variables.description: Age when maximum blood pressure is recorded.

variables.name: age_observation_median_bp
variables.description: Age when median blood pressure is recorded.

variables.name: case_control
variables.description: Case/control status.

variables.name: decade_birth
variables.description: Decade of birth.

variables.name: diastolic_blood_pressure_max
variables.description: The pressure of the blood against the artery walls during diastole (the relaxation phase) - max value.

variables.name: diastolic_blood_pressure_median
variables.description: The pressure of the blood against the artery walls during diastole (the relaxation phase) - median value.

variables.name: drug_class
variables.description: The Class of drug listed in study algorithm.

variables.name: race
variables.description: Race of participant.

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender of participant.

variables.name: smoking_status
variables.description: The classification of smoking status based on whether an adult has never smoked, or ever smoked, the latter consisiting of current smokers and former smokers.

variables.name: subjid
variables.description: Deidentified Subject/eMERGE ID.

variables.name: systolic_blood_pressure_max
variables.description: The pressure of the blood against the artery walls during systole (the contraction phase) - max value.

variables.name: systolic_blood_pressure_median
variables.description: The pressure of the blood against the artery walls during systole (the contraction phase) - median value.

variables.name: Age_Observation
variables.description: Age when clinical event recorded in record.

variables.name: Body_Mass_Index
variables.description: Imputed BMI based on 6-months (+/- ) time period.

variables.name: height
variables.description: Subject's height in cm over time.

variables.name: subjid
variables.description: Deidentified Subject/eMERGE ID.

variables.name: visit_number
variables.description: Visit number when measurement was taken.

variables.name: weight
variables.description: Subject's weight in kilograms over time.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Affection Status

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC.

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository.

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJ_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Subject's sample use

variables.name: chip
variables.description: The Illumina chip used to genotype the sample.

variables.name: newlygenotyped
variables.description: Some samples were pulled from previously genotyped studies and other samples were genotyped as part of a focused resistant hypertension study.

variables.name: sampid
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: subjid
variables.description: Subject ID
